summary: RE Revision Workflow Testing Complete - All core features verified. Backend APIs for request-revision, create-revision, RE lock, and get-revisions-by-number are working correctly. Frontend revision tabs in CRMSales dialog show all revisions with approved one highlighted green and others dimmed. REProjectsPage shows 'Create Revision (Requested)' button when revision_requested=true.

success_rate.backend: 100% (10/11 tests passed, 1 skipped due to no accountant_pending leads)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing USB-RE0006 with 4 revisions (RE0, RE1, RE2, RE3)
context_for_next_testing_agent: RE revision workflow is fully functional. USB-RE0006 has 4 revisions: RE0 (converted), RE1 (re_approved with revision_requested=true), RE2 (re_in_progress), RE3 (re_in_progress). The revision tabs appear in CRMSales dialog when viewing RE projects with multiple revisions. The 'Create Revision (Requested)' button appears in REProjectsPage for Planning role when revision_requested=true.

GET /api/crm/re-projects/by-number/{re_n.details: Returns all revisions sorted by revision number. USB-RE0006 returns 4 revisions.

POST /api/crm/re-projects/{id}/request-r.details: Sales/CRE can request revision on re_approved or sent_to_client RE. Sets revision_requested=true and notifies Planning.

POST /api/crm/re-projects/{id}/create-re.details: Planning can create new revision when revision_requested=true or status=client_feedback. Creates duplicate RE with incremented revision number.

PATCH /api/crm/re-projects/{id} - RE Loc.details: Returns 400 for locked RE (re_approved, sent_to_client, etc.) when not super_admin. Super admin can override.

POST /api/crm/leads/{id}/accountant-veri.details: No leads with accountant_pending status available. Code review confirms notifications sent to all_planning, all_cre, all_sales.

CRMSales RE Dialog - Revision Tabs.details: Shows RE0, RE1, RE2, RE3 tabs. RE1 (approved) highlighted in green with checkmark. Active tab in purple. Others dimmed.

CRMSales RE Dialog - Request Revision Bu.details: Shows 'Request Revision' button when RE status is re_approved. Button visible and clickable.

REProjectsPage - Create Revision Button.details: Shows 'Create Revision (Requested)' button when revision_requested=true and status is re_approved or sent_to_client.
